title: Metal Machines Construction Destruction Trackset for 4 Years+ with Mini Racing Cars, Diecast Cars Race Track, Frustration Free Packaging (Brown Mail Box)
features: Motorised speed booster that always keeps your metal machines in the run.
2 extremely fast and aerodynamic metal machines!
A construction machine throwing stone blocks to knock cars out of the racetrack!
Two exclusive metal machines: Specter and Justice!
description: Product Description An extreme pursuit around a building site can end terrible for one of the racing drivers, as bold are thrown into the air while they run and skip a giant machine! A booster keeps both cars at highest speed, but who will stand the last? Speed past the loop, skip the ramp and make sure not to be stuck by the competition, as any wrong movement can make you fall off the track and lose! Safety Warning Danger of suffocation - small parts - do not eat
